sources.name: Niedersachsen State Court Decisions (Nds. Rechtsprechungsdatenbank)
sources.notes: Official Lower Saxony case law database. Maintained by OLG Celle and NI justice portal. Contains published decisions in civil, family, criminal matters. Free for non-commercial use. OLG Celle decision

sources.name: Saarland State Court Decisions
sources.notes: Saarland judiciary and justice ministry portal. Legislation already blocked (DE/Saarland). Case law from Saarland courts published via justice portal and juris cooperation. HTML scraping. Free adminis

sources.name: Thueringen State Court Decisions (Thueringer Rechtsprechungsdatenbank)
sources.notes: Thueringen state law portal at landesrecht.thueringen.de includes court decisions alongside legislation. Historical records from 2010 onward. Legislation (DE/Thueringen) already blocked as javascript

sources.name: Calcutta High Court Judgments Portal
sources.notes: Calcutta High Court (West Bengal, Andaman & Nicobar Islands) at calcuttahighcourt.gov.in. Also covered by IN/HighCourtAWS S3. Verify overlap with IN/HighCourtAWS.

sources.name: Poder Judicial de la Ciudad de Mexico (CDMX Courts)
sources.notes: Mexico City (CDMX) state judicial branch at poderjudicialcdmx.gob.mx. Covers civil, family, and criminal courts. Boletin judicial available. Separate from federal SCJN. Free HTML access. Distinct from

sources.name: Poder Judicial del Estado de Jalisco
sources.notes: Jalisco state courts (second most populous Mexican state). Judicial portal at poderjudicialjalisco.gob.mx. Free HTML access. vLex documents Jalisco case law coverage.

sources.name: Poder Judicial del Estado de Nuevo Leon
sources.notes: Nuevo Leon state courts at pjenl.gob.mx. Consultation systems available. vLex documents NL case law coverage. Free HTML access.

sources.name: Poder Judicial del Estado de Puebla
sources.notes: Puebla state courts (4th most populous Mexican state). State judicial branch portal. Free HTML access.

sources.name: Tribunal de Justicia Administrativa de la Ciudad de Mexico
sources.notes: Mexico City Administrative Justice Tribunal (TJACdMx). Handles CDMX administrative disputes. Has Portal de Justicia Digital. Free HTML access.
